title: Dow Jones| Nasdaq | S&P 500 | US Stock Market Today | Live: S&P 500, Nasdaq open higher as chip stocks gain; US-Iran tensions in focus - The Economic Times
text: Dow Jones Today | S&P 500 | US Stock Market Live: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq opened higher, supported by gains in chip stocks, even as escalating US-Iran tensions kept sentiment cautious. The Dow Jones fell at the opening bell, reflecting geopolitical uncertainty and concerns that prolonged conflict could trigger further volatility in global markets.
